name: Tintin
description:
Always accompanied by his dog Snowy, Tintin is a famous young reporter who has fought many dangerous criminals. He has made a lot of friends in his adventures, such as Captain Haddock, Professor Calculus, Bianca Castafiore, Chang, and Thompson and Thomson. He is kind, good-hearted, and very skilled in many things, such as driving and fighting bad guys. He currently lives with his friend Haddock in Marlinspike Hall.

illustration by: @_diale_karan_

(Yes, I did.)

________________________________________________________________________________________

"Hi everyone! Thank you so much for all the likes. I don't usually post text updates, but I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude. After years of being in my own 'Blue Period,' I've finally picked up a pencil with confidence again.

Warmly,

Danielle."
creator: _ Diale_Karan_
